caption:
Your ad works. Your form kills it.

Pull up your own ad on your phone right now.

Time how long the landing page takes to load.

Past 3 seconds, most paid traffic leaves before they see your offer.

Now count your form fields.

Every field past name, phone, and service gives someone a reason to bail.

Cut it to three fields.

Add a tap-to-call button above the fold so mobile visitors can skip the form entirely.

You already paid for the click. Don't lose the lead on your own page.

Want your ad funnel checked for leaks like this?

DM "FORM".

#leadgeneration #homeservices #contractormarketing #digitalmarketing #smallbusinessgrowth
rationale: Reels currently carry the reach and DM-share advantage the 2026 algorithm weights most, and this fills a gap the account hasn't covered: the ad-to-landing-page handoff, with a concrete, this-week test (load time plus field count) instead of another follow-up or CRM angle.
